assertions.text: Produces a zero-dependency 16:9 single HTML file deck (embedded CSS+JS, no build, no reveal.js)
Uses the 3-visual-style-preview-then-pick flow before rendering the full deck
Includes keyboard nav (arrows/space/F/Esc) and print-to-PDF via CSS @page landscape

cases.prompt: build me html slides / a slide deck

assertions.text: Applies anti-slop rules: no emoji bullets, monotone tinted-neutral palette, max 3 colors
Uses Pretendard for Korean text and density caps
